content.en:
The Traceless True Monarch dared to be arrogant in front of other True Monarchs, and even ignored everything, but he didn't dare to make a mistake in front of Ye Tian.

Without him, just because Ye Tiannai is the true monarch ranked first on the True Monarch List.

Once, the ten True Monarchs at the top of the list of True Monarchs united, and even used many strange things to kill Ye Tian, but they were still all killed.

And now, Ye Tian's strength is definitely stronger than before.

In the face of such a powerful Ye Tian, the Traceless True Monarch himself was like an ant, far from being Ye Tian's opponent.

"Traceless True Monarch, it turned out to be you, you want to kill our True Monarch of the Void Heaven Palace?"

Ye Tian asked coldly.

"Don't dare!" "Traceless True Monarch bent down and said, "I didn't know that True Monarch was the True Monarch of the Void Heaven Palace, if I had known, I would definitely not dare to do it!

Traceless True Monarch wanted to leave, but Ye Tian wouldn't let him leave.

I saw Ye Tian cast the Golden Eye Realm to envelop this area, sealing the void, so that the Traceless True Monarch had no way to escape at all.

"Traceless True Monarch, do you remember that in the realm of the Realm of Origin Realm, you once cast a finger on me?"

Ye Tian asked.

"This ......"

The Traceless True Monarch naturally remembered that he had just entered the Realm Source Realm at that time, and Ye Tian was still a weak True Monarch at that time.

At that time, he undoubtedly regarded Ye Tian as an ant, where would he care about Ye Tian's identity.

He just pointed at random at that time, and when he saw that he hadn't killed Ye Tian, he didn't care much.

But he never expected that in such a short period of time, Ye Tian had grown to the point where he needed to look up, and he could hardly see his back.

He turned into an ant in Ye Tian's eyes, and the status of both sides was reversed.

"Traceless True Monarch, you gave me a finger that day, and I will give you a finger today. Regardless of this finger, whether you can resist it or not, our grievances will be cleared!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"Good!"

Traceless True Monarch nodded.

Although he didn't want to agree, if he didn't agree, he would die.

Besides, he thought that he should have hope of being able to block Ye Tian's casual finger, and he didn't think that Ye Tian would attack with all his might.

In addition, he also has some life-saving things, so he should be sure to live.

Immediately.

He superimposed one treasure after another on his body, and there were some treasures that were not used until the moment of life and death, but at this moment he used all of them, just to be able to block Ye Tian's fingers.

At the same time, the Traceless True Monarch also urged one of his own defensive powers, the Fenggang True Cover, which is also a chaotic divine power, although it was not very high in the past, but the Traceless True Monarch cultivated it to the limit level, and the defense ability was also very good.

With the Fenggang True Hood and the top-notch defensive half-way weapon, coupled with many life-saving things, the Traceless True Monarch felt that he had a great deal of confidence in his life.

Seeing that the Traceless True Monarch was ready, Ye Tian did not use any Origin Divine Power and Chaos Divine Power, but only used his divine power and physical strength, plus the power of the Great Dao.

This finger seems to be very ordinary, but the key is that Ye Tian's strength is too terrifying, and the gap between the two is too big.

The gap between the first place on the True Monarch List and the last place on the True Monarch List can be said to be a big realm difference, even if Ye Tian just strikes casually, it is not a traceless True Monarch that can resist.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's finger descended.

At this moment, Traceless True Monarch shuddered all over, feeling death so close for the first time.

"No!"

Traceless True Monarch's pupils shrank sharply, feeling that he couldn't block this blow, and wanted to escape, but he couldn't escape, because the Golden Eye Realm was still there, and the power of this finger completely imprisoned him.

Click!

The Traceless True Monarch's Fenggang True Mask shattered like a mirror, and then the top half-dao weapon on his body also cracked, and the terrifying impact still shook his body.

One by one, the life-saving things are broken, and it is still difficult to resist the power of this finger.

In an instant, all the life-saving things were exhausted, and the body and soul of the Traceless True Monarch began to shatter inch by inch, and there was no way to recover at all.

One finger later!

The Traceless True Monarch fell to his knees, his body had lost his vitality, his soul had also been annihilated, and the half-way armor on his body had also turned into pieces and fell off his body.

A true monarch is a true monarch, and he has fallen.

Killing the Traceless True Monarch casually, this was very normal in Ye Tian's opinion.

After all, how powerful his strength is now, he is not known how many times stronger than when he killed the top ten true monarchs in the first place, like a true monarch like the Traceless True Monarch, crushing him is no different from crushing an ant.

After killing the Traceless True Monarch, Ye Tian collected all the belongings on his body.

As a true monarch, the Traceless True Monarch has also gained a lot of treasures when he entered the battlefield relics, so his net worth is also very rich, and Ye Tian has obtained the wealth of the Traceless True Monarch, which can be said to have made a lot of money.

However, compared to the previous harvest obtained in the top True Ancestor Palace, this treasure of the Traceless True Monarch can undoubtedly only be regarded as a small gain.

Swish!

Ye Tian released Jingchi Zhenjun from the inner universe, and he was only afraid of an accident if there was an accident, in case a wave of Jingchi Zhenjun was affected, with Jingchi Zhenjun in that state, I am afraid that a little impact would be enough to kill him.

At this moment, although Jingchi Zhenjun was still seriously injured, he had just taken some healing treasures and recovered a little from his injuries.

"Thank you Wanfa Daozi for saving your life!"

Jingchi Zhenjun bent down and saluted.

"It's nothing, I happened to be nearby, and I received your call for help, so I came over!"

Ye Tiandao.

Jing Chi Zhenjun then remembered that he kept asking for help, and the Void Heaven Temple's distress was suitable according to the range, but the battlefield ruins were very seriously compressed, and he could only ask for help in a small area.

He didn't expect that in such a small range, Wanfa Daozi happened to be here, otherwise, he would probably fall and die.

"Wanfa Daozi, this is a true ancestor corpse I found from a ruin, and there is a storage space in his body, which stores a large number of resource treasures!"

Jingchi Zhenjun took out what he had harvested and prepared to hand it over to Ye Tian.

Ye Tian's divine sense swept and saw some classics and more than a dozen Chaos Alchemy classics, so he said: "I'll only take some classics, plus some resources, and the rest will be yours!"

"His Royal Highness Wanfa Daozi, I ......"

Jingchi Zhenjun wanted to say something, but after Ye Tian took those things, he left.

Jing Chi Zhenjun looked at the large number of treasures left, and immediately felt very grateful to Ye Tian.

"It's time to leave the battlefield ruins, it's too dangerous here, and now I'm lucky enough to get so many treasures!"

Thinking so, Jingchi Zhenjun flew towards the entrance and exit of the battlefield ruins.

The other side.

Ye Tian stopped, and a token appeared in his hand.

Before, he took not only some classics from the treasures given by Jingchi Zhenjun, but also a token.

At that time, he felt that the token was somewhat familiar, so he took it casually.

Now, when he took a closer look, he found that the token was very similar to the Black Wind Mountain Minor Boss Token he had obtained.

"This is the Black Wind Mountain Peak Lord's Order!"

Ye Tian was surprised.
